title: John Sherriff
compiled_truth: John Sherriff is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (1980-01-01 to 2002-01-23), John Sherriff sent 39 and received 1242 emails, totalling 1281 interactions. Top correspondents: [Greg Whalley](people/greg-whalley) (9), [Mark Frevert](people/mark-frevert) (8), [Mike McConnell](people/mike-mcconnell) (7), [Michael Brown](people/michael-brown) (7), [John Lavorato](people/john-lavorato) (6).
